title: carya ovalis var. obcordata
intro: Carya ovalis var. obcordata, also known as the American sweet gum tree, is a lesser-known variety of the sweet gum tree with heart-shaped or kidney-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Carya ovalis var. obcordata are derived from its bark, roots, and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
